name: Flowermate Slick
summary: A conduction pen-style vaporiser for dry herb and concentrate with a glass mouthpiece and swappable battery, for patients who want one device for both.
description: The Flowermate Slick is a slim pen-format vaporiser that takes both dry herb and concentrate via separate pods, so it covers two prescription formats in one device. A borosilicate glass vapour path keeps flavour clean, and three presets (196, 204 and 215C) are selected with a single button. The 18650 battery is removable, so you can swap in a charged cell instead of waiting. The 0.3g oven suits single-person dosing. For a UK patient who wants flexibility between herb and concentrate in a discreet pen, the Slick is a practical all-rounder. One-year warranty.
